title: Quilted FPS
description: Quilted aims to provide great performance and QOL whilst staying as vanilla and server friendly as possible.
body:
# Quilted ![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/s9F5nvoj?label=Quilted%20Enjoyers&style=for-the-badge) **Quilted is a Client Side Modpack using the [Quilt](https://quiltmc.org/#:~:text=The%20Quilt%20project%20is%20an,toolchain%20with%20an%20open%20ecosystem.) Modloader that aims to provide high-tier performance along with a large amount of Quality Of Life features and customization. Follow the project for notifications on future updates!** **1.20 coming soon** ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Quilted uses the [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports) Mod which disables chat reporting and telemetry, if for some reason you want to play without this just remove it from your mods folder which can be accessed via Mod Menu. The 1.19.2 version of Quilted also uses the [Essential](https://essential.gg/en/) Mod which adds multiple small and useful features such as cosmetics and a friends list, it is also a dependency for [Easify](https://modrinth.com/mod/easeify). You can turn off viewing cosmetics in settings. ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- **WIP area:** All mods used in the pack (In the most current update) are linked below (and already are in the version's dependencies tab):
Performance Mods:

#### Performance mods: - **Lithium** - **Sodium** - **Starlight** - C2ME - Cull Less Leaves - [Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify) - Enhanced Block Entities - EntityCulling - [Exordium](https://modrinth.com/mod/exordium) (Which seems to be [Hud Caching](https://github.com/Moulberry/MCHUDCaching), (Now part of Sk1er's [Patcher](https://github.com/Sk1erLLC/Patcher)) but for newer versions) - Fastload - FerriteCore - Krypton - Language Reload - LazyDFU - MemoryLeakFix - More Culling - Smooth Boot - Very Many Players

Quality Of Life Mods:

#### Quality Of Life Mods: - Enhanced attack indicator - Advancement Info - Inspecio - [Fabrication](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabrication) - ShulkerBoxToolTip - Chat Patches - [Monsters In The Closet](https://modrinth.com/mod/monsters-in-the-closet) - [Easify](https://modrinth.com/mod/easeify) (1.19.2 only)

Optifine Replacements:

#### Optifine Replacements: - OptiGUI - Continuity - Animatica - Entity texture features - [Lambdabettergrass](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdabettergrass) - [Lambdadynamiclights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)

Dependancies:

#### Dependencies: - [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) - [QFAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl) (Fabric API replacement) - [Puzzle](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle) - Indium

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ### **FAQ:** **What about mod y?** - [Boat Item View](https://modrinth.com/mod/boat-item-view): Made redundant by [Fabrication](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabrication) - [ClickThrough](https://modrinth.com/mod/clickthrough): Bannable on some servers (Most notably Hypixel) - [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3): Was made partially redundant by [Lucium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lucium) in 1.19.2, but will be tested in a experimental branch for 1.19.3 - [Title Fixer](https://modrinth.com/mod/title-fixer): Made redundant by [Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify) - Quilt Kotlin Libraries: Will be tested in an experimental branch - Slyde: Had this in one of the first modpack tests, and then found out it had no config and even applied to the fps slider, cool mod though! - EatingAnimation: I don't have a reason not to add it, I just don't want to bugfix it with textures and stuff, install it separately if you want - Some sort of HUD mod, for now try out MiniHud, EverGreenHud or CustomHud **Note: I am not part of the wonderful team that develops Quilt, but be sure to check them out!** Why are you down here lol
